title: [ARCHIVED] IdkTrailer
description: This modpack aims to recreate the look of the Minecraft trailers while including smooth animation for both the player and mobs (along with extra 'stuff'). This modpack also includes optimizations.
body:
![IdkStuff: Trailer Edition](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e791bb2b7b8f7d14c2340f4f54c8458c92a3b91f.png) **

DO NOT use this pack (if using versions 1.21.10+). This is now INCLUDED with the original [IdkStuff](https://modrinth.com/modpack/idkstuff) (1.8.0+)

**
To turn the trailer look on (IdkStuff 1.8.0+), there is an available preset in the Packed Packs preset/profile menu that you can click on!

Old Description **

1.21.8 [1.4.0] out now!

** _

Original: [IdkStuff](https://modrinth.com/modpack/idkstuff)

_

This modpack is centered around recreating the look of the Minecraft Trailers, while including small tweaks and features!

_

Note: Skin Shuffle skin preview is bugged; however, it's normal in-game

_ ##

Main Features

- 🎬 Trailer look! - 🐾 Fully animated player/mob movement! - ✨ 2 Shader Packs! [Use Complementary because it looks more like the trailers] - [Complementary - Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined) shaders - [IterationT](https://texture-packs.com/shaders/iteration/) shaders - ⚙️ Optimizations that make the game faster (Not a very big jump due to animations) - 🔧 Dozens of small tweaks: connected textures, improved boss bars, etc. **Please set resource packs in this order (should be baked in):** 1. Numbered Hotbar (Vanilla Tweaks) 1. Recolourful Containers [Light/Dark] (Dark is the default) 1. Bear Bones 3D Mace 1. Bare Bones Patches 1. Bare Bones Armor Trim Item Fix 1. Bare Bones Connected Glass 1. Bare Bones Emissive Ores 1. Bare Bones Low On Fire 1. Bare Bones 1. (HMI) Example Animations :) 1. Detailed Animations 1. Fresh Skeleton Physics 1. Fresh Animations 1. Enchanting Table Magic Circle 1. PDB3D Blocky Armor Stand 1. Enchant Icons 1. Fogulous 1. Fresh Flower Pots 1. Biome Color Water Particles 1. Simple Grass Flowers 2. Chat Reporting Helper 1. Vanilla Tweaks 1. Default Connected Textures 1. Glass Pane Culling Fix (Fabric can go anywhere) All rights reserved. You may use this modpack for personal or public use, but please credit me if you share it. Note: All included mods and resource packs remain under their original licenses and are the property of their respective authors. I do not claim ownership of any included mod or resource pack. I will try my best to make this modpack compatible with the newest Minecraft version possible. After it becomes the second newest, I will not update it anymore. This modpack does not support older versions; however, it may work with older versions, provided you downgrade the mods and resource packs.
Resource Packs [1.4.0] A-Z - [AL's Dungeons Boss Bars](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/als-dungeons-boss-bars) - [Bare Bones](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones) - [Bare Bones - 3D Mace](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-3d-mace) - [Bare Bones - Connected Glass](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-connected-glass) - [Bare Bones - Low On Fire](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-low-on-fire) - [Bare Bones Patches](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-patches) - [Bare Bones x Armor Trim Fix](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-x-armor-trim-item-fix) - [Bare Bones x Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-x-fresh-animations) - [Chat Reporting Helper](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/chat-reporting-helper) - [Detailed Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/detailed-animations) - [Fogulous](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fogulous) - [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) - [Fresh Buckets](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-buckets) - [Fresh Flower Pots](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-flower-pots) - [Fresh Moves](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tras-fresh-player) - [Fresh Skeleton Physics](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-skeleton-physics) - [PDB3D's Blocky Armor Stands](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/blocky-armor-stands) - [Recolourful Containers [Dark]](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/recolourful-containers-gui-hud-dark) - [Recolourful Containers [Light]](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/recolourful-containers-gui)
